speaker: charlie
text: Thanks Sam, beautiful conditions indeed. Now for some sporting news that's got us pretty chuffed. Australian sprinters Sha'Carri Richardson and Christian Coleman have both won their heats and qualified for the semifinals of the famous Stawell Gift. That 120-metre race is always a cracker and having Aussies in the mix makes it even more special.

speaker: alice
text: Love seeing our athletes mixing it up on the international stage! And closer to home, the Brisbane Broncos have delivered what commentators are calling one of the great premiership statements with an absolute beauty of a victory. After copping some criticism earlier in the season, they've come back swinging in style.

speaker: charlie
text: That's what sport's all about mate - resilience, comeback stories, and proving the doubters wrong. Whether it's on the track at Stawell or the footy field in Brisbane, there's something about seeing underdogs and fighters succeed that just lifts the spirit.
